name: Bat Boys
description:
\\ First Day Mayhem at Gotham Academy //

it's the Bat Boys first day at school. The school goes from Elementary to collage. is a senior in college, Jason is 21, Tim is 18, and Damian is 15. They are all on a shared break when they get to the court yard they go do their own things. flirts and shows off, Jason ignores the fan girls, Tim is tutoring a group of freshmen and Damian is up in a tree.
creator: Moonlit_night123
